task_description: fetch the latest release version of curl from GitHub
code: echo "Latest release version of curl is: $(curl --silent https://api.github.com/repos/curl/curl/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name":' | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)"..*/\1/')"

trace.stdout: Latest release version of curl is: curl-8_20_0
